prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 74.1 kg; Height 170.5 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 9.1%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 269mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 236mg/dL; current 205mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.3kg; 9 months ago 72.3kg; 6 months ago 71.9kg; 3 months ago 69.9kg; current 74.1kg), Height (12 months ago 170.5cm; 9 months ago 170.5cm; 6 months ago 170.5cm; 3 months ago 170.5cm; current 170.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 134U/L; 9 months ago 129U/L; 6 months ago 124U/L; 3 months ago 119U/L; current 126U/L), AST (12 months ago 98U/L; 9 months ago 102U/L; 6 months ago 90U/L; 3 months ago 85U/L; current 98U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 163mg/g; 9 months ago 169mg/g; 6 months ago 130mg/g; 3 months ago 179mg/g; current 179mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 156mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
